name: KTLYST - Straumann Group - Phishing Domains (2026-04-13)
description: Phishing infrastructure identified by KTLYST for Straumann Group. Block inbound mail referencing these domains and rewrite any outbound links through URL Defense.

policyRoute.name: KTLYST - Straumann Group - URL Defense Reroute
policyRoute.notes: Admin review before enabling: confirm no legitimate vendor domains are in the KTLYST list. Route sits in front of the default TAP URL Defense route.
